result.stdout:
DynamoDBToLiteDB v0.0.5

USAGE
  DynamoDBToLiteDB <manifest-summary> [options]
  DynamoDBToLiteDB [command] [...]

DESCRIPTION
  Accepts a manifest-summary.json S3 URL or file and saves it to a LiteDB database

PARAMETERS
* manifest-summary  File path or S3 URL of manifest-summary.json 

OPTIONS
  -o|--output       Database file path Default: "./lite.db".
  -b|--backup-path  Path to store downloaded backup files Default: "/tmp/inspectra-clifx-dynamo-a042f747-bab3633a/tmp/571db".
  --clean           Remove downloaded backups after processing Default: "True".
  -c|--collection-name  Collection name inside the database Default: "default".
  -j|--journal      Enable LiteDB journaling to ensure data integrity during operations. Disabling may improve performance for bulk imports but increases risk of data loss if interrupted. Default: "True".
  -p|--password     Password for the LiteDB database 
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  ToCsv             Converts LiteDB data to CSV (or any-delimited) format. 

You can run `DynamoDBToLiteDB [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

commands.payload:
DynamoDBToLiteDB v0.0.5

USAGE
  DynamoDBToLiteDB <manifest-summary> [options]
  DynamoDBToLiteDB [command] [...]

DESCRIPTION
  Accepts a manifest-summary.json S3 URL or file and saves it to a LiteDB database

PARAMETERS
* manifest-summary  File path or S3 URL of manifest-summary.json 

OPTIONS
  -o|--output       Database file path Default: "./lite.db".
  -b|--backup-path  Path to store downloaded backup files Default: "/tmp/inspectra-clifx-dynamo-a042f747-bab3633a/tmp/571db".
  --clean           Remove downloaded backups after processing Default: "True".
  -c|--collection-name  Collection name inside the database Default: "default".
  -j|--journal      Enable LiteDB journaling to ensure data integrity during operations. Disabling may improve performance for bulk imports but increases risk of data loss if interrupted. Default: "True".
  -p|--password     Password for the LiteDB database 
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  ToCsv             Converts LiteDB data to CSV (or any-delimited) format. 

You can run `DynamoDBToLiteDB [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
DynamoDBToLiteDB v0.0.5

USAGE
  DynamoDBToLiteDB ToCsv <Whitelist-fields...> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Converts LiteDB data to CSV (or any-delimited) format.

PARAMETERS
* Whitelist-fields  Space-separated whitelisted field names to export 

OPTIONS
  -d|--db           Database file path Default: "./lite.db".
  -o|--output       Output file path Default: "./output.csv".
  -b|--batch        Processor batch size Default: "10000".
  -w|--where        SQL-like WHERE filter, e.g. IsActive=true Default: "0=0".
  -c|--collection-name  Collection name inside the DB Default: "default".
  -p|--password     LiteDB database password 
  -s|--separator    Field separator Default: ",".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.
